title: coelorachis helferi
intro: Coelorachis helferi, also known as Helfer's club moss, is a rare and endangered species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelorachis helferi include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Coelorachis helferi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
